title: Monitoring Rollback Incident Console Model
description: Umbrella model for the full Monitoring / Rollback / Incident Console readiness layer. Tracks aggregate readiness across all sub-components.

fields.name: component_readiness
fields.purpose: Keyed readiness status per sub-component (monitoring, rollback, incident)

fields.name: console_state
fields.purpose: Current console state: monitoring_incident_readiness_only | review_only | active

fields.name: rollback_plan_registry_ref
fields.purpose: Reference to the active rollback plan registry model ID

fields.name: incident_record_ref
fields.purpose: Reference to the active incident record schema model ID

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution. No real monitoring daemon, no background worker, no alert sending, no incident notification, no incident mutation, no real rollback execution, no rollback mutation.
